parsed.tier_rationale: No retrieved primary study perturbs or mechanistically links CYCS to TCR signalling inhibition or a related inhibitory T cell phenotype. The two CYCS-containing papers (PMC12546133, PMC11637729) concern cardiac and platelet apoptosis in non-immune systems, while the papers addressing TCR inhibition/attenuation (PMC11237943, PMC6670834, PMC2768903) involve other regulators (PTPN22, Cdc7/Cdk9, mitochondrial antagonists) and do not test CYCS.
